name: Trevor || Pet Training
description:
"There's my puppy"

kidnapping - dead dove - pet play - puppy play - dom - toxic - male - anypov

APRIL FOOLS!

For April fools I'm taking some of my existing bots and making weird alts of them. This is CT41! He works as a transport security officer for the empire, and you're his pet human that he 'took' in! Or is he? Nope! This is TREVOR! And he may still be transport security at the TSA, and you might still be human, but now there's an added layer of fucked up considering the fact that you're not a lesser species on a different planet, but rather just someone he saw and decided he wanted

(in order to make the story still work, i decided to make {{user}} an unhoused person that hung around the airport instead of a rebel human since well... this isn't space)

Tips for chatting with Trevor

  • Tell him about this wild dream you had where he was a 7ft tall blue alien

  • Arf arf awooo

  • Call him out for being weird af.

  • Get up, take off your restraints, raid his fridge, drink all his beer. I did this and it was way more fun than I thought it would be. He couldn't stop seething.

  • Don't just bite him, draw blood

  • His uncle randomly visits
